title: 1st Certified %100 150 Image-Matching Test UK 1500 - 2000. YOU should try it!!!

enrichment.summary: Kyle narrates himself taking a 150-question image-matching history test on an educational platform covering England from 1500 to 2000, reciting historical facts decade by decade while adding personal commentary and opinions. He works through Tudor England, the Reformation, the British Empire's expansion, the Industrial Revolution, and into the 20th century, ultimately scoring 100% on the test.
enrichment.speaker: mixed

stances.position: Reminds him of Donald Trump — narcissistic, murderous of wives, used religion for personal gain

stances.topic: Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire
stances.position: A masterpiece; grateful it exists because Gibbon likely used sources now lost
England killed millions of Irish and stole northern Ireland, which is why England still owns it today
Finds it oddly sleep-inducing despite being engaged; his brain resists being used this way
Wants to do all countries and centuries but needs financial help to continue

entities: Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire
Essay on the Principle of Population
